actions.name: Mattie: Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Welcome to New York, Nancy!  I'm really glad you could come out  here on such short notice.<c0><o><n>

npc_entries.text: It's always nice to come back to the Big Apple - and now I get to stay with a famous soap opera star. It must be exciting work!<h><n>
I'm happy to help in any way I can.  Aunt Eloise told me that someone on the set is getting death threats.<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: Skipping out
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hi, Nancy. I'm sorry for skipping out on you like that, I guess I'm not a very good hostess. It's just that this whole thing with Rick really shook me up.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I understand, but now that the studio's closed to visitors, I'm at a dead end.<h><n>
I just ran into Lillian, and she kicked me out of the studio.<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: this is horrible
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh Nancy, this is horrible!  There's no way that could have been an accident. I think it's another attempt to get Rick!  The timing's just too weird - all of these threats and now he's almost killed on stage!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I understand, but now that the studio's closed to visitors, I'm at a dead end.<h><n>
I just ran into Lillian, and she kicked me out of the studio.<h><n>

Mattie: Not aa that exciting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Believe me, it's not all that exciting, with 5am shoots, a million lines to learn, people all uptight and yelling.  And now Rick's getting these death threats!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: But it can't be all that bad being a star, can it?<h><n>
Tell me about the death threats.<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: Not aa that exciting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, for the past month, my co-star, Rick Arlen, has been getting these awful death threats.  At first, we all shrugged it off - you get the occasional 'odd' letter in this business.  But, then they started to get...weird.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Weird?<h><n>
Have you ever received an 'odd' letter?<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: totally bizarre
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>They're totally bizarre.  Not only did he get letters, but somebody sent him a box of poisoned chocolates, a broken watch - and then there's that whole thing with the teleprompter.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Tell me about the letters.<h><n>
Someone sent him poisoned chocolates?<h><n>
What was the broken watch about?<h><n>
So, what happened with the teleprompter?<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: Letters
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, the first ones had the letters cut out of magazines, you know, like on a ransom note?  They were all signed by someone named B.T. Kaisuur.   Somehow, the news leaked out, and the press totally jumped on them. Then they started getting ugly and twisted.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: chocoholic
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Rick's a major chocoholic; his fans and friends are always sending him boxes of candy. But these chocolates were so nasty, Rick spit them out.  I've NEVER seen Rick say no to chocolate before.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: broken watch
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Someone sent him a broken watch with the hands at five minutes to midnight and a note saying, 'Time's running out'.  That one really freaked me out!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: teleprompter
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, I was reading the teleprompter during a scene with Rick.  All of a sudden, my lines read, 'YOU'RE GOING TO DIE A HORRIBLE DEATH, RICK'.  At the time, we all thought it was some sick joke, but nobody admitted to doing it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: Running Late
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy, I'm running late; I need to get to the studio.  Hey, why don't you come over and visit?  I'll leave a visitor's pass for you at the security desk.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: before I forget
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, before I forget, here's a copy of the house keys.  I'm ALWAYS losing my keys, so I've got plenty of copies.  I'll write the studio's address on your map.  Just catch a taxicab outside, and show them the map.  They'll know how to get there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Add Inventory Item, No Hot Spot
Mattie: get you back
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>There's got to be a way to get you back into the studio.  Whoever's leaving these threats  for Rick also has access to the studio.  Wait a minute - I've got an idea.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: text -> frame text box
actions.text: I don't care who he is.  No one breaks a<n>contract with Bill Pappas.  I'll kill him<n>before he runs out on me.<n><e>

actions.name: text -> frame text box
actions.text: What kind of studio are you running here?<n>My client could have been killed!<n><n>

npc_entries.text: Really?  Who is your agent?<h><n>
That sounds great, but what should I say if they ask about you and me?<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: be all that bad

actions.name: Mattie: odd one

actions.name: Mattie: thats the problem

actions.name: Mattie: Lillian pretty cranky
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, Lillian's pretty cranky these days.  Wait a minute - I've got an idea on how you can get back into the studio!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: As if!  I'm lucky if I can remember my stage left from my stage right!  Dwayne was very helpful,  I can't believe he got me a part just like that!<h><n>
I just hope that I'll have enough time to investigate.<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: you're OK
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh Nancy - I'm so glad that you're OK!  Everyone's been talking about that bomb scare. Rick's still shrugging it off, but I can tell he's upset about it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: Dwayne's a great guy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Dwayne's a great guy; he gave me a chance when no one in this town would even give me the time of day.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I don't think Dwayne likes Rick very much.<h><n>
Has he been an agent for a long time?<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: struggling actors
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Actually, he and I were struggling actors - doing summer stock, community theater.  I went on to do Juliet with Rick, and Dwayne came to the city to start his own talent agency.  I guess he'd had enough of the acting scene.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I don't think Dwayne likes Rick very much.<h><n>
That's a pretty big leap from acting to being a talent agent.<h><n>

actions.name: Mattie: feeling's mutual
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Actually, the feeling's mutual.  Dwayne was Rick's agent and helped him get the part of Rory Danner.  But later on, Rick ditched him to go with a larger agency, I guess to help him get out of his contract here.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: MATTIE --> Right side of the SIN
Mattie: Rick's pressuring me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Rick is pressuring me to use another talent agent - one that can get me a movie contract and a better deal here.  Sometimes, I wonder if it'd be a smart move.  It's just that I feel loyal to Dwayne.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: Not for Dwayne
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Not for Dwayne - he's like a chameleon - he can fill any role.  At the Belfry, he did everything - it was amazing:  sales, makeup, carpentry, acting.  But, I sometimes wonder if he's cut out to be an agent.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: What do you mean?<h><n>
I don't think Dwayne likes Rick very much.<h><n>

Rick's a wonderful guy; I have no regrets.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Mattie: Lillian's too smart

actions.name: Mattie: Rick and I
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Actually, Rick and I are no longer dating.  But, come to think of it, I do know someone who could be jealous enough of Rick to do something like this: Yuri Danner, Rick's twin brother!<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Mattie: I'm sorry nancy
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>I'm sorry, Nancy.  It's been a running joke around here.  You see, Rick's character has  an evil twin, Yuri, and everyone's been saying that it's him who's causing all this trouble. But seriously, I have no idea who could be behind this.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Mattie: I got on board
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ever since I got on board, about a year ago.  Rick had been on the show already for one  or two seasons, and the writers decided to make us a couple.  You know, Yuri Danner, Rory's  twin brother, was pretty upset with that.  Do you think it could be him?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:Uh oh
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Uh oh.  Well, I hate to tell you this, but the guys on the team all shaved their heads and... I just got a tooth knocked out last week in practice.  But, I know you'll still love me.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: Hannah told me

npc_entries.text: Well, I'm getting along so far.<h><n>

actions.name: Ned: How's it going

npc_entries.text: Well, I'm getting along so far.<h><n>

actions.name: Ned: jet setting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm not sure I like you jet setting across the country meeting all of these Enrico Suaves!  So, are these threats he's been getting serious?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: The threats are, but Rick's not.  He's pretty nonchalant about them.<h><n>
Yes - and he's not only getting letters, but tainted chocolates, broken watches.<h><n>

actions.name: Ned:that's odd
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, that's odd.  Maybe there's more to the threats than he's saying.  There might be some information in them that he doesn't want you to know about.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:tried to find
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Have you tried to find out where these objects are coming from?  That might lead you to your culprit.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hello, there - oh, are you a visitor?  According to the policies memo dated July 14th, 1954, no one is permitted in the prop room, except for those people permitted in the prop room.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: Yes, my dear
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, my dear.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I need to get something for Mattie from the prop room.<h><n>
Hi, how can I enter the prop room?<h><n>

actions.name: Millie: come back
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I see you've come back to try and solve my riddle - it's more difficult than you thought, eh?  Now listen carefully.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: Hello
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hello, young lady.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: Hello 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hello, young lady.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: Why hello
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Why, hello!  I hear you've become quite the celebrity, saving Rory Danner from those diabolical traps set by that cold blooded scoundrel, Yuri.  Thank goodness you had my wire cutters, else you would've been blown all the way to Bakersfield!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Don't you mean, Rick Arlen?  And who is Yuri?<h><n>
Thanks - it was nothing, really.<h><n>

actions.name: Ned: sorry nancy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Sorry, Nancy.  That's your department!  I'm the one who tackles the bad guy, remember? What's his name?  Rick?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: No, Rick's not the bad guy - do I detect a twinge of jealousy?<h><n>
Come to think of it, I wonder if that is his name.  Do you think Rick could be sending himself death threats?<h><n>

actions.name: Ned: I'm jealous
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes - I'm jealous that my girl is spending more time with this guy than with me.  But, as long as you still love me, I'm here for you.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: why would he do that
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Why would he do that?  But, maybe there's something you're seeing that I'm not.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: Police couldn't hear
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Probably something the police couldn't hear.  Maybe there's a way you could change the speed of that voice, or something.  You might recognize it then.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: if it's locked
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>If it's locked, it must be important.  She may want you to answer some kind of puzzle to get in, but maybe there's another way to get past the gate.  You'll find a way.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: any info on this guy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Do you have any other information on this guy?  Maybe there's an employee file for him at the studio?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: differnt MO's
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, sounds like two different MO's.  But what a clue! Now if you can only find the typewriter that drops its 'Y'.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: that is strange
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That is strange.  But remember, this is just circumstantial evidence.  It might not be  the prop master who's typing these letters.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: soap opera star
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>My girlfriend, the soap opera star!  Now you'll never come back home!  Hmmm, I bet if you  contact some of Dwayne's other employees, they might have some information related to the case.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned: another way in
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I bet there's another way in.  Maybe there's a side entrance.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: talk to director
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You may want to talk to the director, Lillian Weiss, if you want to become 'permitted'. She likes to do all of the hiring around here.  Good day, my dear.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:get the combination
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy, I know you can get that combination.  But no one will give it to you without a good reason.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Add Inventory Item, No Hot Spot
Ned: pretty scary
actions.npc_text: <i>It was pretty scary for a minute there.<n><n><c1>And then what happened?<n><n><c0>Once I defused the bomb and got out of there, I called the police, and I was stuck at the station for hours. They searched the dressing room and sent the bomb off to the crime  lab, but they didn't find anything.  Oh, and remind me to thank Chief McGinnis when I  get back home.  He vouched for me when I asked for a copy of the tape.<n><o>

actions.name: Ned: gotten out of control
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>It sounds like things have gotten way out of control.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Ned: another call
actions.npc_text: <i>Oh, Ned - I've got another call.  It's probably the police.  I love you and I promise I'll be careful.  Call you later, OK?<n><n><c1>Okay.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: don't let just anyone
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I see.  Well, I don't just let anyone enter my prop room without showing me that they're clever enough to take on the responsibility.  Listen to my riddle, and when you know the correct answer, I'll let you in.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: you look at me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>When you look at my face it's easy to see, you're looking at you when you're looking at me. What am I?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: that's not it
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That's not it - try again<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Can I hear that riddle again?<h><n>
I give up - I do't know.<h><n>

actions.name: Millie: come back
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Come back when you've found the answer.  Good day, my dear.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:help you with
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>So, what else can I help you out with?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I think that's it for now.  I miss you.<h><n>

actions.name: Millie: That's it
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>That's it!  I have stumped many people with my riddles, but you are quite the sleuth. You may go and enter the prop room now, while I go and 'unpowder' my nose. Achoo!<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Ned:back to your sleuthing
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay, I'll let you get back to your sleuthing.  Be careful.  I love you.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:miss you
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I miss you, too.  Goodbye!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:bye nancy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Bye, Nancy.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Ned:hurry home
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hurry home and be careful.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Leave message
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hi, you've reached Bess Marvin.  I can't come to the phone right now, but please leave a message, and I'll get back to you as soon as I can.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: First Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>This is Bess.<c0><n><n>Hi, Bess, it's Nancy.<n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Second Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>This is Bess.<c0><n><n>Hi, Bess, it's Nancy.<n><n><c1>Hello, any new developments on the case?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: No way Rick
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>No way, Nancy!  Why would he send death threats to himself?  Get real.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Maybe it's a cover-up and he's trying to blame someone else?<h><n>
It could be a publicity stunt.<h><n>

actions.name: Bess: Rick not like that
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>But Rick's not like that - he always seems so caring.  On the other hand, his character isn't all that nice.  Do you think some psycho fan who's confused reality with fiction could be doing this?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: No, I'm convinced it's an inside job.<h><n>
Mattie joked about it being Yuri behind all of these threats.

actions.name: Bess: Eliminate Agent
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Then that would eliminate your agent, right?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Eliminate Agent
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, that narrows down your list of suspects then.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Ugh Twins
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ugh, what is it with evil twins and soap operas?  I wonder when they're going to have evil triplets?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Other suspects
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>So, who are the other suspects?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: bes05

actions.name: Bess: Gotta go
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay Mom, I'll be right down.  Nancy, I got to go.  Give me a call later if you need some help, okay?  Bye!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Millie's Cats
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>That must be Millie Strathorn.  Did you know she owns the entire network and it's worth millions?  She's a total cat lover; I heard she treats her cats like royalty.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Bess: Intro
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy!  Tell me everything!  Did you get Rick's autograph for me?  He's so gorgeous. It must be so exciting to be on the set with all of those stars!  George filled me in on everything that's happened, so tell me who the suspects are.  I can't believe someone would do this to Rick.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: You know, it just might be Rick who's behind these threats.<h><n>
Let's see, there's this odd woman who's the prop master.<h><n>
Mattie is really nice, but I can't rule her out.<h><n>
The producer doesn't exactly like Rick but I've yet to meet him in person.<h><n>
There's the director, Lillian Weiss, who's not a very happy camper.<h><n>
My agent, Dwayne Powers, is pretty cool, but let's just say he's not one of Rick's number one fans.<h><n>

actions.name: Millie: Rory Danner
actions.npc_text: <i>No, I mean Rory Danner, young lady!  Yuri is Rory's evil twin.  He's always trying to bump off Rory.  With his brother out of the way, Yuri thinks he'll have a clear shot at Serena.  I've  been trying to help him ever since Rory showed up in Jackson's Wharf.  That Rory Danner needs to be taught a lesson!<n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Weird if Mattie
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Oh, my gosh, wouldn't it be weird if Mattie was behind it all? What if Mattie really had a secret motive to get rid of Rick, like Marlena on 'Crimson Cove' last year?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: I don't think so, Bess.  Real life isn't a soap opera, you know.<h><n>
She seems evasive at times.<h><n>

actions.name: Bess: NYC attitude
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Maybe it's just that New York attitude?  It really wouldn't make much sense, though, for Mattie to scare Rick off.  I mean, without him, where would she be?  What good is Serena Livingstone without Rory Danner, you know?<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Bess: Pappas
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Who's the producer now - is it William Pappas?  Worldwide just hired him, like, six months ago to improve their ratings. 'Crimson Cove' is really beating 'Light of Our Love'.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: bes05

actions.name: Bess: Pappas to gotta go
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Who's the producer now, is it William Pappas?  Worldwide just hired him like six months ago to improve their ratings - 'Crimson Cove' is really beating 'Light of Our Love'.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Lillian dump
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Oh, yeah! 'Chatter Magazine' had a whole spread on their break-up at some elegant restaurant.  She dumped a whole pitcher of water on Rick's head!<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Lillian and Rick dated?<h><n>
How long were they a couple?<h><n>

actions.name: Bess: Lil date time
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Mmmm hmmm, I think they started dating once he go onto the show.  They'd always show up at these Hollywood premieres together.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Bess: Off in a minute
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>(Okay - I'll be off in a minute!)  Nancy, I gotta go soon.  So who else have you met?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: bes05

actions.name: Bess: Gotta go
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay, Mom, I'll be right down.  Nancy, I gotta go.  Give me a call later if you need some help, okay?  Bye.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Not that long
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Not that long.  I think Rick started going out with that Hollywood actress, Kendra Wells, soon after the break-up.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Told Dwayne
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Never heard of him.  It's so funny to hear you say, 'my agent'.  So how did you hook up with him?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: He's Mattie's agent and her good friend.  He pulled some strings so I could work
Really?  I thought you would have heard of him.<h><n>

actions.name: Bess: Exciting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Wow, how exciting!  So are there any other openings?  I'll work for free.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Never heard of him
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>I'm not that much of a fan, but I know about most of the major agencies soap operas use, and I've never heard of any 'Dwayne Powers'.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Bess: He's Cute
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>I know Rick has a reputation for being a practical joker, but I'd think he'd get enough publicity by just being cute.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm not sure if that's a good thing to do, but if you really must get in there, why don't you use the old 'credit card through the door lock' trick?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Mmmm, sounds pretty risky.  Don't you have something at hand that you could use to jimmy the door open?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy, I'm sure a master detective like you could figure this one out!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Login ID Location
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Millie is probably the best person to find this out from.  After all, she owns the place.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: ID Locale
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>See if someone has written their login ID somewhere near their desk.  That's where most people put their password.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: No help
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You're good at snooping these things out.  I'm sure you'll find it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Control Room password
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Lillian probably has it written down somewhere in her office.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: control room pwd
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I doubt Mattie would have it; someone more involved with directing  or producing probably would know it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: No help
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Gee, Nancy, I don't know where that'd be.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Employee Log
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You'll probably need to find an employee ID number.  They're often listed on employee passes.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: employee ID
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You'll probably need to find an employee ID number.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Emp ID
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>The report probably works with something besides an employee name.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Castor Oil
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ewww, that sounds weird.  But maybe she's just sick or something. That doesn't really prove anything.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: icky chocolates
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>So she put the castor oil in Rick's chocolates to make them taste bad?  Boy, that's a dirty trick.  But, it doesn't mean she sent the other threats - or does it?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: you got the pass
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, no!  Well, as long as you have your employee pass, you're still free to get around, right?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Equalizer
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Try to see if you can hear the person's real voice on that bomb tape. Or else, see if you can hear anything else on that tape that would give away the maker's identity.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: equalizer
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Try to see if you can hear the person's real voice on that bomb tape.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Emp ID
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy, I'm sure a master detective like you could figure this one out.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: surveillance video
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, try looking for it in the control room.  They probably have lots of equipment and tapes up there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Owen video
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That doesn't sound too weird, unless there's something more in the videotape that you're just not seeing.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: icky chocolates
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Wow, maybe this guy knows about the accident; or maybe he's behind it all. You've got to find out about this stage hand.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: find OS info
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>See if you can track this guy down. Try looking him up in personnel files.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: OP file
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>See if you could track this guy down. He may have some important information.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: find computer
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Now all you need to do is find a computer. Try Lillian's office; she probably has access to the network from there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: find computer
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Now all you need to do is find a computer.  Try finding one in the administrative areas.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: find computer
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Now all you need to do is find a computer.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: be careful
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, be careful, Nancy.  It just seems so risky.   Maybe you can get someone else in the building to let you in. Just don't blame me if you get caught.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm not sure if that's a good thing to do.  But, if you really must get in there, why don't you use the old 'credit card through the door lock' trick?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Mmmm, sounds pretty risky.  Don't you have something at hand that you could use to jimmy the door open?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: CC Trick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy, I'm sure a master detective like you could figure this one out!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: combo
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's one of those combination locks, right?  My dad has one of those and he keeps the combination hidden in his office.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: clear Dwayne
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, that pretty much clears Dwayne, right?  I mean, if Rick leaves 'Light of Our Love', that could seriously jeopardize the show.  If the show is cancelled, then Dwayne would lose his contracts there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: owen theater
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You know, employment records can easily be falsified.  Find out more information on him.  I'm sure Mattie would have known him. Have you asked Lillian about him?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: bomb threat
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>The villain must know you're hot on the trail, but how?  Nancy, don't give up now.  You've got to solve this mystery before it's too late.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Careful
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Definitely!  But be careful; this may very well be the end to your mystery.  You should be safe as long as the security people are there.  Call on them if you need them.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: definitely
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Defintely!  But be careful, this may very well be the end to your mystery. I know that after you eliminate whatever doesn't work, you'll figure out this mystery.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: mystery at end
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Definitely!  But be careful, this may very well be the end to your mystery.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Mattie keys
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, I wouldn't do that, unless you had some convincing evidence.  You're violating her privacy.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Busted
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh no!  What happened?<c0><n><n>They confiscated my pass.  I guess this takes me off the case permanently.  I should have been more careful.<n><n><c1>Well, better luck next time.  I just hope there'll be a next time for Rick.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Remove Inventory Item, No Hot Sp
Millie: who? Rick Arlen?
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Who? Rick Arlen? I never heard of him.  You don't mean, Rory Danner, do you dear? He's a no-good, good-for-nothing, do-nothing, if you ask me.  He's been a trouble-maker ever since he's got here.  What that man needs is a good swift kick in the you-know-what -  causing poor Serena all that grief with his scampering around!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie:Okay
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Bess: Gotta go
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Give me a call if you need some help, okay?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Answering Machine
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>This is George Fayne.  After the tone, please leave your name, phone number, and a brief message.  Thanks!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Intro
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Fayne Residence.<c0><n><n>Hi, George - it's Nancy!<n><o>

actions.name: George: Intro3
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Fayne Residence.<c0><n><n>Hi, George.<n><n><c1>Hey, Nancy - what's new on the case?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Not much, but I'll call you when I find out more.  Bye, George.<h><n>
I'm not sure what I should do next.<h><n>

actions.name: George: Kidding
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You're kidding?  Don't tell Bess that!  She'll want to fly out there and save him; she absolutely adores Rick Arlen.  So, have you met any of those other daytime superstars?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Bess Knows
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>If there's one thing Bess knows, it's her soaps.  But you're out of luck; she's gone out of town for a couple of days.  Is there anything I can help you out with?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Not that I can think of right now - but I'll get back to you.  See you, George!<h><n>

actions.name: George: I Like
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Really?  I like Mattie Jensen.  Is she as nice in real life as she is on-screen? I always heard soap stars can be a bit temperamental.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: She's nice, but I never get to see her because she's so busy.  So, what's new with you these days?<h><n>
I wouldn't call her temperamental, but she is very upset about these threats.<h><n>

actions.name: George: training
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm starting to train for the annual River Heights marathon next month.  But, tell me more about your new case.  What have you found out so far?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Not much, but I'll call you when I find out more.  Bye, George.<h><n>

actions.name: George: thing for Rick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm... I wonder if she has a 'thing' for Rick.  So, what have you found out so far?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Not much, but I'll call you when I find out more.  Bye, George.<h><n>

actions.name: George: Palm Trees
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Wow!  From the palm trees of Florida to the streets of New York City, Nancy Drew is on the case. What is it this time: missing jewels, international spy-ring... maybe a ghost or two?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Stop teasing, George!  Nothing as exciting as a haunting, but something a bit more
I wish it were only a ghost or two, but it's a lot more serious.  Get this: Rick

actions.name: George: Pick up pass Easy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You'll probably need to go to the studio to pick it up.  I'm sure you can catch a taxicab outside to take you there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Pick up pass Medium
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You'll probably need to go to the studio to pick it up there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Pick up pass HARD
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, can't help you with that one.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Not yet
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>No, not yet.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I should get back to the set.  See you, George!<h><n>

actions.name: George: Yah, she's here.
actions.npc_text: <i>Yeah, she wants you to call her, right away.  She can't wait to hear all about your new case, especially about Rick Arlen.<n><o>

actions.name: George: Sound Stage
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hmmm, I would think your studio pass could get you in. That is, when they're not filming.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Millie: good luck finding him

npc_entries.text: What do you mean?<h><n>

actions.name: George: EZ Level: Wire Cutters
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You always find the oddest things lying about.  Hold onto it. I'm sure it'll be useful somewhere.  Maybe it'll be needed in an upcoming scene. Try to find a script to see where it's needed.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: keep on toes
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Stay on your toes, Nancy, and make sure you have all of the tools to get the job done.  Check out the scripts to see if they hold any clues. You never know what you'll find when you read between the lines.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: memo
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You know, I bet they changed the lock combinations because of that bomb scare.  See if you can find a memo or maybe a note to Mattie about this.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: George: Intro2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nancy!  How are you?  Are you still in Florida?  Did you ever solve that case you were working on?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'm in New York right now, on another case.  Get this: Rick Arlen from 'Light of Our Love'
That case is solved; but you're not going to believe this, but I'm now in New York on another case.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: Hello ms drew
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hello, Ms. Drew, this is Bill Pappas - the producer for 'Light of Our Love.'  I just wanted to thank you for your quick thinking and valiant efforts today.  I understand that you've been detained at the police department.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Thank you, Mr. Pappas, but it was nothing really.<h><n>
Yes, I was.  They needed a statement from me.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: very brave
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Well, I believe you're very brave for what you've done.  I can't help but wonder, though, what you were doing in Rick's room.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: I found that it was open and let myself in.<h><n>
I'm investigating the threats against him and wanted to know why his door wasn't locked.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: call you Nancy
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Nancy - can I call you Nancy?  I hate to be blunt about this, but we can't allow anyone to just walk into people's dressing rooms.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Perhaps you should enforce better security, then.<h><n>
Perhaps we can meet to discuss this case in person.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: information
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>What type of information?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'm sorry, but I need to keep that confidential.  You'll need to ask the police about that.<h><n>
Information about the bomb and what I found in the dressing room.  Can I ask who has access to Mr. Arlen's dressing room?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: investigating the threat
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You're investigating the threats?  What are you, some kind of reporter?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Yes, I work for 'Today's Times.'  My name is Brenda Carlton.<h><n>
No, not at all.  Mattie Jensen asked me to look into these threats against Rick, since no one was taking them seriously. <h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: Rick started getting thr
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>What?  Hey, ever since Rick started getting threats, we've taken every measure to insure his safety.  We've even hired more security after that accident in the studio.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Can you answer some questions I have?<h><n>
Perhaps we can meet in person to discuss the case.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: ah no
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ah, no - I'm very busy at the moment.  But seeing what you did today, I guess I owe you one.  What do you need to know?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Can you think of anyone on the staff who has skills in explosives or electronics?<h><n>
Do you believe someone from outside the studio could have done this?<h><n>
Is there video surveillance of the dressing room?<h><n>
Who, besides Rick, would have keys to his dressing room?<h><n>
Are there many people who have access to the studio at night?<h><n>
Who takes care of the teleprompter?<h><n>
Does the studio have any audio mixing equipment?<h><n>
Who else has access to the staff offices?<h><n>
Well, thank you for your help in this matter, Mr. Pappas. Goodbye.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas:I owe you
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Uh, no.  I'm very busy at the moment.  But seeing what you did today, I guess I owe you one.  What do you need to know?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Can you think of anyone on the staff who has skills in explosives or electronics?<h><n>
Do you believe someone from outside the studio could have done this?<h><n>

Who, besides Rick, would have keys to his dressing room?<h><n>

Who takes care of the teleprompter?<h><n>
Does the studio have any audio mixing equipment?<h><n>
Who else has access to the staff offices?<h><n>
Well, thank you for your help in this matter, Mr. Pappas. Goodbye.<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: do not use explosives
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>We definitely do not use explosives on our set.  We use outside pyrotechnicians for  location shoots.  And of course, all of our technical crew are very knowledgeable about electronics, but I couldn't picture any of them making a bomb.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Are there many temporary employees working at the studio?<h><n>
Is there anyone on the technical staff that would hold a grudge against Rick?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: That's impossible
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>That's impossible.  This set has been closed down tight since that accident.  I even hired extra security.  My own mother couldn't have gotten in here.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp18

actions.name: Pappas: working with police
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Ah, we're currently working with the police on that - but there are no security cameras in dressing rooms.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:Only Rick
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Only Rick and the security personnel - we've already checked into this.  Rick is very touchy about his room and won't even let the janitors clean it unless he's there.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: That's odd - has he always been this way?<h><n>
How many security people do you employ?  Is it just Ralph?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: Only our key talent
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Only our key talent and some of the floor managers have access - and, of course, myself and Lillian.  But we've often got projects going on around the clock - post-production work and set design, to name a few.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Can I have a list of everyone who's been in the studio at night?<h><n>
Is it possible for me to have the code for the talent entrance?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: lead script writer
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Well, in theory, it's the lead script writer's job to manage that part of  production; but a lot of the actors, especially Mattie, like to edit their script to add emphasis or direction.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Is Ms. Strathorn the lead script writer?<h><n>
So then anyone has access to the teleprompter?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: whole department for aud
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Of course we do.  We have a whole department set up for audio recording, and we also have some mixers in the control room.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Do you think I can see them sometime?<h><n>
Are there many people who have access to the mixers?<h><n>

actions.name: Pappas: the usual people
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>The usual people: janitors, some assistants, Millie, security.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Pappas:anything else
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Now, is there anything else you need to ask of me?  I'm in a bit of a hurry.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas: very busy
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Yes, well, thanks again for your brave efforts today.  Goodbye.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Pappas: snoopy reporters
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh yeah?  Well I don't deal with snoopy reporters.  You can put me down for NO   COMMENT!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Pappas: remember him
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, I remember him.  I guess he's an old friend of Dwayne Powers who needed a   job.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Pappas:either temp or permanent
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Yes, but all of our employees, either temps or permanent, are highly qualified and come from the best agencies.  We don't hire just anyone and we carefully screen our employees.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:get back to work
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Listen, I need to get back to work.  Do you need anything else?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:not studio psychologist
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Look, I'm not the studio psychologist.  Rick's not the easiest guy to work with - neither am I.  But then, I don't have people leaving me threatening letters in my office.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas: looking into that
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>We're looking into that.  Listen, we run a studio down here, not a prison.  Sometimes staffers borrow the security videos when they run out.  We've addressed this problem before and I can guarantee it won't happen again.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Pappas:Hold on for a sec
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Hold on for a sec.  (No, tell him I'll call him...DON'T put him on hold, I'll call him!) What else do you need?  Hello?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:Rick's very controlling
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Yes, Rick's very controlling like that.  It took us weeks to renegotiate his contract. He had all of these detailed demands, like about lighting, script direction, the placement of his name in the credits.  He's unbearable at times.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Pappas:that's confidential
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That's confidential, but rest assured that we hire the best security and Mr. Guardino comes highly recommended - he's my wife's cousin.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:that's confidential
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>That's confidential.<n><o><c0>

actions.npc_text: <c1><i>No, not at all.  She's always submitting scripts and story ideas to our writers, but they never go anywhere.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: pp17

actions.name: Pappas:looked int oteleprompter
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>We've already looked into that incident with the teleprompter - anyone from the stage hands to myself could have rigged it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Pappas: no longer conducting tou
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>We're very busy with production right now and we're no longer conducting tours.  If you...Hold on. (NO!  Get someone else for that; we need to have someone on standby if he decides to leave).  Sorry about that, Nancy. Any other questions?<n><o><c0>

actions.npc_text: <i><c1>May I help you?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Yes, hi.  I'm a friend of Mattie's, and I'm interested in learning more about a job with the studio.<h><n>
I'm a bit lost.  Can you please direct me to Mattie Jensen's room?<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian:  See you got a job
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ah, I see Mattie's friend is now working as an extra for us. So, are you trying to get discovered, or are you just hard-up for a job?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'm working with Dwayne Powers' agency.  I heard he's a really good agent.<h><n>
I'm just excited to start working with an experienced crew.

actions.name: Lillian:  It's you again Conditi
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's you again.  What do you want?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Oh, I'm sorry for bothering you - I'll leave right away.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian:  It's you again Conditi
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's you again - what do you want?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Oh I'm sorry for bothering you - I'll leave right away.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Bomb Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, well, well.  I see our local hero has shown up for work.  Not only can she waste everyone's time with prying questions, but she can find the time to save Rick from being blown to smithereens.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: Greeting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Do I look like a tour guide?  Look, the set's closed to visitors.  I'll need to take your pass away. But if it's any consolation, I'll be more than happy to show you the door.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Remove Inventory Item, No Hot Sp
Lillian: little Miss Sherlock Ho
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, it looks like we've got ourselves a little Miss Sherlock Holmes on the set!  Look, we didn't hire you to play Junior Detective, so don't be sticking your nose where it doesn't belong, OK?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: out of your league
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I think Rick's completely out of your league. But, he'll flirt with any skirt.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Hmph, well if you were good enough for him, then why shouldn't I be?<h><n>
You dated him, right?  It must've been exciting to date a star.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Listen
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Listen - you don't know a thing about Rick and me.  He used me to meet my friends from LA to try and schmooze his way into films.  All along, I thought he really loved me, but he just walked all over me.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Gee, I'm sorry.  I didn't realize he did that.<h><n>
Mattie warned me about Rick, too.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: ancient history
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, well that's ancient history -  just like it is between Rick and your friend, Mattie.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: What do you mean, between Rick and Mattie?<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Rick Rlen like Rory
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>If you think Rick Arlen is anything like Rory Danner, you're in for a very unpleasant surprise.  The guy is slime! He'll walk all over you like he walked over Mattie and me. Listen, if he bothers you anymore, let me know, and I'll have a word with him.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: How did he walk over Mattie?<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Rick Rlen like Rory
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, come on - everyone knows how Rick dumped Mattie.  Rick gave her some bogus story about needing his space to concentrate on his career. Yeah, he had to concentrate on ditching Mattie to date me. You know, I don't think Mattie ever got over it, to tell you the truth.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: Business it of hers
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>What business is it of hers if you date Rick or not?  You know, she used to beg me  not to go out with Rick - she was pathetic!  If you ask me, she's totally love-sick with that guy.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: out of your league
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>No, I can't tell you something about Owen Spayder. Why should I?  It's none of your business.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: Comercial Artists
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, please. Don't get your hopes up too high.  It's not like you're working for Commercial Artists or Edison Talent!  We use Dwayne whenever we need someone right away -  usually extras or gophers. If we really need talent, we call someone else.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: is that so
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Is that so?  Well, I have every reason to kick you off this set.  Where do you get off telling ME what you think?  I'll be calling your agent to let him know we no longer require your services.  Get out of my office!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: on standby
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Don't knock yourself out kid.  You'll be on standby until we know when and if we'll need you.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: ancient history
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You do that.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: gee thanks
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Gee, thanks - goodbye!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: bye
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Buh bye.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: working as an extra
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ah, I see Mattie's friend is now working as an extra for us. So, are you trying to get 'discovered or are you just hard up for a job?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'm working with Dwayne Powers agency.  I heard he's a really good agent.<h><n>
I'm just excited to start working with an experienced crew - it's so much more different than community theater.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian:  It's you again 1
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's you again - what do you want?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Oh I'm sorry for bothering you - I'll leave right away.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian:  It's you again 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's you again - what do you want?<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Oh I'm sorry for bothering you - I'll leave right away.<h><n>

actions.name: LILLIAN: MEET ME
actions.npc_text: <i>Hello?<n><n><c1>I don't have much time to explain.  Can you meet me at the studio later tonight?  I know you won't have any trouble getting in.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: play DIGI Taxi to STUDIO DAY
play DIGI Taxi to STUDIO NIGHT
Lillian: Miss Snoop
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I see our Miss Snoop has shown up.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Lillian, I think you should leave your act to professionals.  I can see right through you.<h><n>
Why did you ask me to come here?<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: own investigation
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You see, I've been doing my own investigation; and I kept on finding more and more things,  until, I got a threatening letter yesterday.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Can I see it?  Do you still have it?<h><n>
Right.  How am I supposed to believe that?<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: you believe me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Now do you believe me?  Who could be doing this?  You must know!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: It was you, Lillian!<h><n>
I believe it was Rick himself.<h><n>
It has to be Dwayne.<h><n>
Do the math, Lillian, it was Mattie.<h><n>
Without a doubt, the prop master is behind it all.<h><n>
Pappas had every reason to do this to Rick.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: me? why?
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You think it's me?  Why?<c0><n><o><n><o>

npc_entries.text: �traps

actions.name: Lillian: was Mattie
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I always knew it was Mattie. That little witch!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Yes, with Rick out of the way, she wouldn't have to share top billing with him. Mattie stops at nothing to get her way - not even murder!<h><n>
Mattie had been sending Rick those letters to force him off the show. She used an old boyfriend, Owen Spayder, to set up those traps for Rick, and used me to throw suspicion off of herself.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: prop master
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That prop master was always too sneaky for my taste.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: You're so right, Lillian.  Her insane desire for control in this studio hit a blank wall master very well...prop master of DEATH!<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Rick
actions.npc_text: <i>I would have never thought it'd be Rick!<n><o>

npc_entries.text: Once I came into the picture, Rick realized I'd see through his phony letter-writing campaign. the case - even if it meant murder!<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Dwayne
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Dwayne Powers?  But why on earth would he...<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: With his intense hate of Rick, doomed financial situation, and that clever disguise as Owen Spayder, Dwayne had every motive and opportunity to commit these threats and traps.<h><n>
Dwayne is a very dangerous individual, ready to risk lives to accomplish his deadly campaign against Rick.  Once we catch him in the act, the safer we'll all be.<h><n>

actions.name: Lillian: Pappas
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Pappas?  But, but...<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Yes, Lillian, it was Pappas all along.  Behind that impenetrable office door, he was busy at work creating a web of mystery and intrigue. No one breaks a contract with Pappas. He'll
Pappas calls the shots in this studio, but he couldn't bear to be overshadowed by Rick's popularity and demands.<h><n>

play DIGI Taxi to MATTIE NIGHT
Lillian: are you sure
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Are you sure? I'm pretty sure it's...<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: It's him
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's him - up in the control room -gasp- and he's locked us in!<c0><n><n>Lillian - hide!<n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: think you're so smart
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You think you're so smart. Well here it is - proof positive!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Lillian: through the act
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, well...I hope you can see through the act of whoever's sending these letters, because I just got one.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Can I see it?  Do you still have it?<h><n>
Right, how am I supposed to believe that?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: that is correct
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>That is correct, Ms. Drew!  And now for the bonus round: Name the washed-up director and interfering actress who will be dead in a matter of minutes.  Hurry up contestants...Time's running out...<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: DWAYNE POWERS
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>DWAYNE POWERS?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: play DIGI Taxi to STUDIO DAY
play DIGI Taxi to STUDIO NIGHT
play DIGI Taxi to AGENCY DAY
play DIGI Taxi to AGENCY DAY
Rick: Greeting
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Hello, gorgeous!  Where have you been all my life?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Well, for a guy who just barely escaped a terrible accident, you're in an incredibly good mood.<h><n>
Uh, River Heights?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick:  My Hero
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>My hero - Nancy Drew!  You know, according to ancient tradition, if someone saves your life, you should serve them for the rest of your life.  So...what can I do for you, young lady?  Your wish is my command.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Yeah, right.  Well, you can tell me if you've noticed any suspicious characters around your dressing room lately.<h><n>
I'm really not that young, Rick.<h><n>

actions.name: Rick:  drive you wild
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Hello, Ms. Drew.  I see you can't get enough of me. Do I drive you wild?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: I was Lucky
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Of course, of course I am! I was lucky. If you're going to be in an accident, that's the best way to be - don't you agree?  But then, I've always been a lucky guy; I just met you, Ms. Drew.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Do you really think it was just an accident?<h><n>
Is it lucky to receive death threats and poisoned chocolates?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Just an accident
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>I see Mattie's been talking to you about me. Of course it was just an accident.  Things like this just happen.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Can you think of anyone with a motive to send you these death threats?<h><n>
Is it lucky to receive death threats and poisoned chocolates?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: think of millions
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>I can think of millions: all of those jealous husbands and boyfriends of the women who send me marriage proposals, cookies and other...'notes d'amour'.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Why haven't you gone to the police with these threats?<h><n>
I would think poisoned chocolates are far from a note d'amour.<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: went to police
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, please.  If a public figure like me went to the police every time someone sent them a nasty gram, the donut shops would lose their best customers!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Old friend of Mattie's
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Touche!  So, you're an old friend of Mattie's? She told me you were coming up to visit.  She said you find me irresistible.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Well, you know how Mattie exaggerates.<h><n>
Actually, I find those letters you've been getting irresistible.  I just love a good mystery.<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Poisoned chocolates?
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Poisoned chocolates?  Oh dear, Mattie's really gone over the top with this.  They were just a bad batch, that's all.  If you dare me, I'll eat one. But if we're going to play that game, I'd prefer another dare.  So, how about it, Nancy: truth or dare?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: OK, truth.<h><n>
Dare.<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: You find me irresisible
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Admit it: you find me irresistible, don't you, Nancy?<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: Actually, I find those letters you've been getting irresistible.  I just love a good mystery!<h><n>
Irresistible is not exactly the word I'd use to describe you, Rick.<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: driving me crazy
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Don't I know it.  She's been driving me crazy worrying about me and these wacky letters I've been getting.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: What's wrong with being concerned?<h><n>
I would think poisoned chocolates are a bit beyond 'wacky', wouldn't you say?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: her priorities mixed up
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nothing - but she's got her priorities all mixed up.  What she should be concerned with is how Powers is driving her career into the ground.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: play DIGI Taxi to MATTIE DAY
play DIGI Taxi to MATTIE NIGHT
play DIGI Taxi to AGENCY DAY
play DIGI Taxi to AGENCY DAY
Rick: You're no fun
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Oh, you're no fun.  Well, mi casa es su casa.  You know, 'my house is your house.'  Feel free to examine the evidence, Ms. Drew, while I go off to wardrobe. Have a chocolate while you're at it!<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Rick: take care of something
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Listen, I need to take care of something, but feel free to stick around.Will you do me a favor, though?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: go to makeup
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay, while I go to makeup, stay here, get all cozy and...<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Rick: Stay Beautiful
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, I have.  They're named Agent Harris, Officer Josewicz, and Detective Bonnet.  It appears I've become quite a celebrity with the local authorities. Hey, I hear 'Detective Beach' is looking for a new star. Do you think I should do some research with my new friends to land the part?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: I forgot
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Right, I forgot.  You're celebrating your 70th birthday next month.  You are soo sassy!  But that's what I love about you.  Sassy!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Dwayne's a loser
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Dwayne's a loser, babe.  Don't tell me he's representing you.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Is that so bad?  He represents Mattie.<h><n>
Didn't he represent you?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Mattie hangs onto Dwayne
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, and that's a problem.  Mattie hangs onto Dwayne like my Aunt Mimi hangs onto cats and old newspapers.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: I made a mistake
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, he did - a very long time ago.  I  was young and naive, just like you, love. I made a mistake, something you can't afford at this point in your career.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: play DIGI Taxi to MATTIE DAY
play DIGI Taxi to MATTIE NIGHT
play DIGI Taxi to WORLDWIDE DAY
play DIGI Taxi to WORLDIWDE NIGH
Rick: Dwayne's a loser
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Whatever anyone's saying, I can guarantee that it's all wrong - I swear!  I'm just misunderstood, that's all.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Uh huh.  So you've never dated Lillian?<h><n>
So, you've never dated Mattie?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Lillian Fling
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Okay, I admit it.  Lillian and I had a brief fling.  But my heart's true to you, love.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Is that why Lillian is so bitter?<h><n>
Was this before or after you dated Mattie?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Lillian's a nobody
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Lillian's a nobody.  She was always after me, and things were breaking up between Mattie and me.  It was just a rebound romance.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Afterwards
actions.npc_text: <i>Afterwards - it was a rebound relationship. Lillian got to show me around to her friends as her trophy win, and it was fun, for a while.<n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Mattie and me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, come on.  Everyone knows about Mattie and me: the perfect match made in soap opera land.  It was too weird, dating her and playing the role on stage. I just had to figure out what was real and what was just an act, you know? I sometimes think, if I can only get out of being Rory Danner, maybe she can get out of being Serena Livingstone.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: What about Lillian?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Bad Reputation
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I know, I've got this bad reputation as being some kind of Casanova, but  everyone's got a second chance, you know? I just wish sometimes I could go back in time, just wake up and find it was just a dream and start all over. I wouldn't be known as 'Rick the Slick,' then.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Millie hates me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Nah, Millie hates me.  Did I tell you she's been trying to write me out of the show ever since I got on board - I don't know why.   Luckily owning the company  doesn't mean you can work as script writer!<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: So you've never dated Mattie?<h><n>
Uh huh, so you've never dated Lillian?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Millie Strathorn
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Old Millie Strathorn - heir to the Worldwide Broadcasting fortune.  She's great - except for the fact that she's never liked me.  She thinks I'm 'too big for my britches'  and that I 'wouldn't know a good thing if it came up to me and stuck its finger in my nose.'<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Know Owen
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yeah, yeah, I know Owen - he was with the Beakman theater, wasn't he? Yeah, yeah, he's kind of short and stocky?  Oh, don't tell me you're seeing him.  Don't break my heart, love.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Intro
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>We're here on the set at Worldwide Broadcasting Studios with soap heartthrob, Rick Arlen.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Question 1
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>The studios are abuzz with talk that you may be heading for a career in films.  Will Rory Danner be killed off the show?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: RIC45
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Rory is a character who is dear to my heart. I'd never put him in a life-threatening situation - I'll leave that to the writers!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Question 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, how could anyone in their right mind leave such a gorgeous co-star, Mattie Jensen?  Is it true that your onstage love affair has led to an offstage romance?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: RIC46
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Only my hairdresser knows for sure!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Question 3
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Weren't you seen with that actress, Greta Von Kamloops at Cannes earlier this year?  Any chance you may be starring in a film with her in the near future?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: RIC47
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>No, not while I'm with the WWB network.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Question 4
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Our sources say that you've been a victim of a stalker - is that true?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: RIC48
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Well, yes in a sense.  I feel like I'm being watched at every moment and always at the same time - weekdays from 2 to 3 on channel 13.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Closing
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, Rick!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Closing
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh Rick!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Interviewer: Intro
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>We're here on the set at Worldwide Broadcasting Studios with soap heart throb, Rick Arlen.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: I was Lucky
actions.npc_text: <i>Of course! Of course I am! I was lucky. If you're going to be in an accident, that's the best way to be. Don't you agree?  But then I've always been a lucky guy, I just met you, Ms. Drew.<n><o>

npc_entries.text: Do you really think that it was just an accident?<h><n>
Is it lucky to recceive death threats and poisoned chocolates?<h><n>

actions.name: Rick: Stay Beautiful
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Stay beautiful!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Ciao
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ciao, bella!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Au revoir
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Au revoir, mademoiselle!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: stay beutiful
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Stay beautiful!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Rick: Stay Beautiful - Pop to No
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Stay beautiful!<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne 1
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I apologize for my abrupt greeting.  You must understand that if I opened my door to every struggling actor in this town, I'd never be able to get my work done.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'll be happy to meet with your assistant, if you're too busy.<h><n>
I'm a friend of Mattie Jensen.  She told me you might be able to get me a job as an extra on 'Light of Our Love'.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Actually, I am in need of an assistant at this moment; I had to terminate my previous secretary.  I'm afraid that my standards are rather high for most people.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I'm a friend of Mattie Jensen.  on 'Light of Our Love'.<h><n>
Well, I'm just starting out in the acting business.  I hope my lack of experience won't hurt my chances of getting a job

actions.name: Dwayne 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, that's okay, Nancy.  It's Nancy...Drew, right?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne 4
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Mattie spoke highly of your abilities, and I am more than happy to give a young actor a chance if I can.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ah yes, Mattie just called me.  You're Nancy Drew, am I correct?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne 5
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Normally, I don't do this, but seeing that you're a friend of Mattie's, I could pull some strings for you.  You see, Worldwide uses me almost exclusively for hiring their talent.  Not only did I provide them with Mattie Jensen, but Rick Arlen, as well.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: How long have you known Mattie?<h><n>
You're Rick Arlen's agent!?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne 6
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Mattie and I go back over 8 years.  We met doing summer stock at the Belfry Theater upstate.  She went on to play Juliet with a touring company and... I started this agency.<n><o><c0>

npc_entries.text: You're Rick Arlen's agent?!<h><n>
You and Mattie must be very good friends.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne 7
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Yes we are.  She's a talented actress and extremely generous, as you very well know.  However, I am afraid Rick may be having a bad influence on her.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Dwayne 8
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>You see, Rick foolishly believes acting is a status symbol not an art form.  He's a ladder climber who'll use anyone to crawl his way to the top - a ladder he's sure to fall from one of these days.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Dwayne 2
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, I was, but I must confess that the man has no talent.  Were it not for his good looks and charm, he'd never have gotten to where he is now.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne 10
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Well, Nancy, you must be anxious to start this assignment. I'll call right now and have a pass waiting for you at the reception desk.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Dwayne 11
actions.npc_text: <c1><i>Now, if you'll please excuse me, I must get back to work.  It was a pleasure meeting you.  Please call on me for any other needs you may have.<n><o><c0>

actions.name: Dwayne: clear to me
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It's clear to me that he's setting this whole thing up to generate publicity for his grand entrance into the film world.  My only fear is that some poor bystander like Mattie, will get hurt.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: That's a pretty harsh statement.<h><n>
Are you jealous of Rick?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: Show business
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Show business is a very harsh world, Ms. Drew.  Look at me; I've studied every aspect of acting: the classics, dialects, stage combat - everything.  I was underrated and under-appreciated - but brilliant.  And yet, a phony like Rick Arlen is a success, and here I am...a talent agent.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: I'm sorry
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm sorry - I guess I still harbor regrets about not pursuing my acting career further. My only point is that Rick has every reason to fake these so-called 'threats' against himself.  He has yet to suffer any harm from them, but the publicity and attention has served him well.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: jealous of what
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Jealous of what?  The man can't act his way out of a paper bag.  Ms. Drew, I've spent years studying drama; but because I'm not a blond-haired, blue-eyed fool, I have no place in this business.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: certifiably insame
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, I've met Millie once or twice.  She's very eccentric - actually owns the studio but chooses to stay locked up in that prop room of hers.  Rumor has it that she's trying to write Rick Arlen out of the show.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: why she would
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I don't see why she would.  Lillian is very professional, though I think she doesn't care for Mattie very much.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Why doesn't she like Mattie?<h><n>
What should I do about this?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: something to do with Ric
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm not sure.  But without a doubt, it has something to do with Rick; he enjoys creating trouble.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: How does he enjoy creating trouble?<h><n>
What makes you so sure it's about Rick?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: make a good impression
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Just make a good impression.  Remember, you're representing me when you're at Worldwide.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: stage managing
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Are you interested in stage managing?  I'd be happy to talk to you about this subject; I used to be quite a whiz at it myself.  Lillian has the entrance code - but I see no reason why you'd need to get up there.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Lillian is shooting
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Not unless Lillian is shooting a scene at night. That entry code is confidential - for obvious reasons.  If you ever have a valid reason for getting in, I could, of course, give you the code.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Yes, she did
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, she did. She was very upset.  She said you accused her of having something to do with Rick's threats?  To tell you the truth, I think you're onto something there.  I've had my suspicions about Lillian for quite some time.  That is why I've asked Mr. Pappas to keep you on with Worldwide.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: What are your suspicions?<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: Only two
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Only two - you and Mattie.  Oh yes, and a temporary stage hand.  It's been difficult finding adequate talent these days.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Do you know where I can find this stage hand?  I haven't seen him around.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: don't believe them
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I don't believe them.  Rick was always known for his odd sense of humor and practical jokes.  Unfortunately, Mattie always fell for them, just like she's doing now.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: don't be so modest
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh come now, Ms. Drew. Don't be so modest.  You mustn't be afraid of vanity; it's done wonders for Rick Arlen.  But don't think for a minute some horrible villain was behind this bomb threat. It has 'Rick' written all over it.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: you that naive
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Are you that naive to believe Rick is in any real danger?  Ms. Drew, I thought you were smarter than that.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: blowing of steam
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Oh, he's just blowing off steam.  Rick's recent threats about leaving the show have put an undue amount of pressure on him.  Upper management seems to fear that the ratings will fall if Rick leaves; although I really can't picture that since Mattie is the real star of 'Light of Our Love'.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: worked w/ Rick
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>When I worked with Rick at the Belfry, he was always playing off of people's weaknesses - starting rumors and fights.  He always seemed to prey on the most gullible people.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: stress of the show
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I really believe the stress of the show and her past relationship with Rick may have  pushed her over the edge.  Just be careful and don't believe everything she says.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: he's scheduled
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I'm not sure when he's scheduled to work next.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Yes Miss Drew - Generic
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Yes, Ms. Drew.  What can I do for you?<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: da bomb
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Ah, Ms. Drew.  Mattie told me all about the bomb you defused.  What a stroke of luck you were passing by - with Rick's dressing room right next to Mattie's she could have gotten killed.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: I think Rick was in more danger than Mattie.<h><n>
Thank you, but it was nothing really.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: be of service
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>It was a pleasure to be of service.  Good day, Ms. Drew.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: be of service
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Thank you for checking in with me.  I like to know how things are working out at Worldwide.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: be of service
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Goodbye and good luck.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: be of service
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Feel free to contact me if you need additional assistance.  Goodbye.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Answering Machine
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>You've reached the Powers Agency.  Interviews are only taken by appointment. Thank you.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Answering Telephone
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Powers Agency - how may I help you?<c0><n><n>Hi, Mr. Powers, it's Nancy Drew.<n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: STAGE FRIGHT
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Why hello, Ms. Drew.  I only followed Lillian here, but I've trapped both of you!  Your deaths will make a wonderful end to Act I; Rick Arlen's death will be the climax to this little soap opera I've produced.  I'm calling it 'One Death to Die'.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Dwayne, why?  Why do you hate Rick so much?  Mattie and Lillian have more reason to
Dwayne, this isn't a soap opera.  You're dealing with real people.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: More reason than I
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>More reason than I?  Rick Arlen has to die and I'll tell you why: because he killed me.  He killed Dwayne Powers.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: So you were behind this campaign of terror all along?<h><n>
How did you pull this off.<h><n>
Dwayne, this isn't a soap opera - you're dealing with REAL people..<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: Take credit
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I wish I could take credit for it all - but it was really Rick who started it.  He sent the first letters, probably to drum up publicity for his failing career. And Lillian, of course, was kind enough to supply him with the tainted chocolates. You see, Ms. Drew, everyone hates Rick.  I'm doing the world a service by getting rid of him.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Dwayne, don't do anything you'll regret.  There's still time to let us go.<h><n>
Mattie still cares for you - you're making a big mistake.<h><n>
Dwayne, this isn't a soap opera - you're dealing with REAL people.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: I made them stars
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>No!  I made them stars; I did it all.  And how did Rick repay me? By leaving me and destroying my business.  Once he left, I lost all of my clients left except for Mattie.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: How did you pull this off?<h><n>
Dwayne, this isn't a soap opera - you're dealing with REAL people.<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: Real life IS a Soap
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Real life IS a soap opera - you'll learn that.  Or rather, you would have learned that, had you lived.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Mattie still cares for you - you're making a big mistake.<h><n>
Dwayne, there's still time to let us go - please don't do this!<h><n>

actions.name: Dwayne: Enough!  Words, words..
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>Enough!  Words, words, words!  You will soon see that I am a man of action! I'll come down for the final close up.  I'm going to write you two out of the script forever!  So sorry about your short lived career, Ms. Drew.<c0><n><o>

actions.name: Dwayne: Owen Spayder
actions.npc_text: <i><c1>I disguised myself as Owen Spader to gain access to the studio.  I had everyone fooled.  But then you came along and found out too much.<c0><n><o>

npc_entries.text: Dwayne, don't do anything you'll regret.  There's still time to let us go.<h><n>
Dwayne, this isn't a soap opera - you're dealing with REAL people.<h><n>
